title: implement quick create and edit tools
description:
## Summary
- Replaced BugReportWidget and HelpPanel with new TicketWidgetBar
- Added TicketQuickCreate (modal) for admin and portal contexts
- Added TicketQuickEdit (slide-over) for admin (edit) and portal (comment) contexts
- Added public /api/tickets/comment endpoint for portal feedback

## Test plan
- [x] task workspace:validate
- [x] Dev server smoke test (returned 200)

Closes T000385
